title: A few remarks on hyperstatistics and some applications
summary: In a recent paper [arXiv:2604.24783 (2026)], we have proposed a general approach to treat systems with inherent non-Boltzmann-Gibbsian behaviour. Given the extremely high accuracy of our approach, we have adopted the term hyperstatistics. We have applied such a statistical mechanics approach, i.e., hyperstatistics, to the discharge of a capacitor in a RC series circuit, pumping of $^4$He of a closed cycle cryostat, midrapidity data of $p$-Pb collisions at the LHC, as well as for the distribution of accelerations in turbulent systems. Here, we discuss into more details the ground of hyperstatistics. We demonstrate the versatility of hyperstatistics upon applying it to the velocity autocorrelation function in Brownian motion and also regarding its potential to describe brain dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"超统计"（hyperstatistics）框架，用于处理非玻尔兹曼-吉布斯行为系统，并展示了其在电路放电、低温系统、高能碰撞、湍流、布朗运动及脑动力学等多个领域的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有统计力学框架（玻尔兹曼-吉布斯统计）在处理某些复杂系统时存在局限性，需要一种更通用的方法来描述非玻尔兹曼-吉布斯行为。
AI.method: 提出"超统计"（hyperstatistics）方法，一种对非玻尔兹曼-吉布斯系统的通用统计力学处理框架。
AI.result: 该方法在RC电路放电、闭循环低温泵^4He pumping、LHC p-Pb碰撞中快度数据、湍流加速度分布等多个系统中得到验证，并展示了在布朗运动速度自相关函数和脑动力学中的潜在应用。
AI.conclusion: 超统计是一种高精度、通用的统计力学框架，可广泛适用于多种非玻尔兹曼-吉布斯系统。

title: Tuning ergodicity breaking: Anomalous diffusion under asymptotic power-law forcing
summary: In non-Markovian systems, distinct dynamical phases arise from the competition between internal memory and external forcing, encompassing thermalization, persistent ergodicity breaking, and runaway energy growth. This study shows that the scaling parameter $η$ governs the emergent phase diagram within a system described by the Generalized Langevin Equation, particularly when subjected to external drives with asymptotic power-law tails. Three universal regimes for diffusive processes are delineated by this parameter: thermalization ($η> 0$), non-ergodic saturation ($η= 0$), and a force-dominated runaway phase ($η< 0$). The fluctuation-dissipation theorem, within this framework, is shown to be independent of external force and determined by the integral of noise density of states. A selective breaking of ergodicity is revealed by this formulation; microscopic fluctuations are decoupled from the drive, yet the relaxation completely encodes it, which in turn controls the kinetic effective temperature. Direct Langevin simulations in the Markovian limit quantitatively confirm this classification, capturing the non-thermal plateau at the critical point.

AI.tldr: 本文通过广义朗之万方程研究非马尔可夫系统中的动力学相变，发现缩放参数η控制三个普适区间：热化（η>0）、非遍历饱和（η=0）和力主导的失控相（η<0），并揭示了波动-耗散定理与外力无关的特性。
AI.motivation: 探究非马尔可夫系统中内部记忆与外部驱动竞争如何导致不同的动力学相（热化、遍历性破缺、能量失控增长）及其背后的统一标度规律。
AI.method: 基于广义朗之万方程（GLE）理论分析，引入缩放参数η刻画渐近幂律尾外驱动下的相图，结合马尔可夫极限下的直接朗之万模拟进行定量验证。
AI.result: 发现η>0热化、η=0非遍历饱和、η<0力主导失控三个普适区间；波动-耗散定理与外力无关，由噪声态密度积分决定；揭示了微观涨落与驱动解耦但弛豫完全编码驱动的选择性遍历性破缺。
AI.conclusion: 建立了非马尔可夫系统动力学相图与标度参数η之间的普适关系，为理解记忆效应与外力竞争导致的非平衡相变提供了统一框架。

title: Hydrodynamic tails in chaotic spin chains with quantum group symmetry
summary: The interplay between symmetry and thermalization governs the late-time dynamics of local quantum and classical many-body systems at nonzero temperature. Recently, two parallel frontiers have emerged: the search for robust anomalous hydrodynamics -- such as superdiffusion -- in generic, non-integrable models, and the formal effort to generalize the fundamental concept of global symmetry. In this paper, we bridge these frontiers by demonstrating that quantum group symmetry provides a novel mechanism for anomalous hydrodynamics in chaotic systems. We study the dynamics of local operators carrying $U(1)$ charge in non-integrable lattice models that also have quantum group symmetry. One example is transverse spin in the XXZ model with integrability breaking deformations. While such excitations are expected to decay very quickly at high temperature because their charge forbids overlap with conventional hydrodynamic densities, we find that protection by the quantum group symmetry makes these modes long-lived, despite the absence of local quantum group charge density or current. Furthermore, the dynamics is superdiffusive across Hamiltonian, Floquet, and classical realizations, and exhibits unusual finite size effects at very late times. We also revisit transverse spin dynamics in the integrable XXZ model.

AI.tldr: 本文发现量子群对称性为混沌系统的反常流体动力学（如超扩散）提供了新机制。在具有U(1)对称性和量子群对称性的非可积晶格模型中，局域算符受量子群保护而长寿命，并表现出超扩散行为，且该行为在哈密顿、Floquet和经典系统中均成立。
AI.motivation: 作者希望连接两个前沿领域——反常流体动力学（如超扩散）和全局对称性的推广，探索量子群对称性能否为非可积混沌系统提供新的反常流体动力学机制。
AI.method: 研究具有U(1)电荷和量子群对称性的非可积晶格模型（如加入破坏可积性形变的XXZ模型），分析横向自旋等局域算符的动力学行为，并与可积XXZ模型进行对比。
AI.result: 量子群对称性保护横向自旋等算符，使其在高温柔乱系统中长寿命，尽管缺乏局域量子群电荷密度或流；动力学表现为超扩散，在Hamilton、Floquet和经典实现中均成立，且在极晚时间呈现异常有限尺寸效应。
AI.conclusion: 量子群对称性为混沌系统中的反常流体动力学提供了新机制，有望推动对量子群对称性与热化、一般性扩展对称性及其动力学后果的理解。

title: Asymptotic hydrographs and anomalous dispersion in mass-conserving storage cascades
summary: Sums of independent exponential random variables lead to the Erlang distribution, providing a direct probabilistic route from exponential waiting times to the integer-shape gamma law. This paper investigates how this classical construction changes when the exponential waiting-time density is replaced by the $q$-exponential density of nonextensive statistics. Our main result is an analytical asymptotic expression for the outflow of a mass-conserving cascade of reservoirs driven by a $q$-exponential waiting-time kernel. In the critical case $q=5/3$, the large-cascade flow rate converges to a stable Lévy density whose time argument is shifted by a Galilean-type transformation. This shifted Lévy law gives the asymptotic hydrograph of the cascade. We also found that for the entire regime $1<q<2$ the macroscopic dynamics are governed by $α$-stable Lévy laws. This proves that anomalous non-Gaussian dispersion can emerge from pure mass-conserving convolutional chains without invoking fractional derivatives.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了当指数等待时间密度被q-指数密度替代时，经典Erlang分布如何变化。主要成果是给出了质量守恒级联水库在q-指数等待时间核下的渐近流出解析表达式。在临界情况q=5/3时，大级联流量收敛到经伽利略变换时间平移的稳定Lévy密度。对于1<q<2整个区间，宏观动力学由α-稳定Lévy律支配，证明异常非高斯弥散可从纯质量守恒卷积链中产生，无需引入分数阶导数。
AI.motivation: 探索当经典指数等待时间被非广延统计中的q-指数密度替代时，独立指数随机变量和的经典构造（Erlang分布）会发生怎样的变化，以揭示异常扩散现象的微观起源。
AI.method: 通过将质量守恒的级联水库系统与q-指数等待时间核耦合，推导大级联极限下的渐近流率解析表达式，并分析不同q值区间下的统计行为。
AI.result: 在q=5/3临界情况下，级联流量收敛到经伽利略变换时间平移的稳定Lévy密度；在1<q<2整个区间，宏观动力学由α-稳定Lévy律支配。
AI.conclusion: 异常非高斯弥散可以从纯质量守恒的卷积链中自然涌现，无需引入分数阶导数，为理解复杂系统中的反常输运提供了新的理论框架。

title: Quantum-Geometry-Induced Superconductivity near a Fractional Chern Insulator
summary: Recent moiré experiments and numerical studies of interacting Chern bands have revealed fractional Chern insulators, charge-density-wave order, and superconductivity as proximate correlation-driven phases in topological systems. How these phases compete or intertwine, and how quantum geometry shapes their interplay, remain open questions. Here we present an analytic study of competing correlation-driven phases in a partially filled Chern band using a coupled-wire construction and bosonization. The key ingredient is the coexistence of interaction channels that favor, respectively, a fractional Chern insulator (FCI) and a closely related anti-FCI (aFCI) state. The aFCI channel is specific to lattice Chern bands and is enhanced by the quantum geometry of the underlying band structure. We show that when both FCI and aFCI scattering channels are present, their interplay generates an effective coupling that drives a superconducting instability near the FCI phase. The same mechanism can also favor a charge-density-wave phase, depending on microscopic parameters. Using a perturbative renormalization-group analysis, we obtain the phase diagram and identify a superconducting regime adjacent to the FCI phase. We further estimate the superconducting transition temperature and show that it is enhanced by quantum geometry. Our results establish quantum geometry as an organizing principle for the interplay among FCI, aFCI, and superconducting correlations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过耦合导线构造和玻色化方法，解析研究了部分填充陈带中FCI、反FCI和超导序之间的竞争与交织，发现量子几何通过增强反FCI通道促进超导，并建立了邻近FCI相的超导相图。
AI.motivation: 拓扑系统中分数量子陈绝缘体、电荷密度波和超导等关联驱动相如何竞争或交织，以及量子几何如何塑造这些相之间的相互作用，目前尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用耦合导线构造和玻色化方法进行解析研究；通过微扰重整化群分析获得相图；结合FCI和反FCI散射通道的共存及其有效耦合驱动超导不稳定性。
AI.result: 发现FCI和反FCI通道的相互作用产生有效耦合，驱动FCI相附近的超导不稳定性；相同的机制在微观参数改变时也可导致电荷密度波相；超导转变温度随量子几何增强而升高。
AI.conclusion: 建立了量子几何作为FCI、反FCI和超导关联之间相互作用的组织原理，揭示了量子几何增强超导性的新机制。

title: LLM-Guided Test-Time Discovery of Quantum-Chemical Approximation Algorithms
comment: 13 main pages, 6 main figures, and 2 tables
summary: Quantum chemistry simulations underpin modern materials discovery, yet their impact is limited by steep computational cost and dependence on fixed approximation schemes. Foundation models, such as machine-learned interatomic potentials, have accelerated parts of this workflow, but their reliance on large-scale pretraining restricts adaptability at the frontier of chemical space, where methodological innovation and sparse data are the norm. Agentic AI systems can automate existing simulation pipelines, yet they remain constrained by the predefined tools and algorithms they orchestrate. In response, we introduce LADeQ, an LLM-guided workflow that discovers, implements, and benchmarks candidate approximation algorithms at test-time within existing quantum chemistry codes. Rather than selecting from a predefined repertoire, LADeQ constructs candidate approximation schemes on demand, drawing on techniques from disciplines such as spatial statistics, circuit simulation, and kernel methods that have had little prior presence in electronic-structure theory. Because it builds on an out-of-the-box language model, LADeQ requires no task-specific pretraining or curated data, and the resulting implementations are transparent and inspectable, with explicitly traceable approximation errors that enable principled control of accuracy--efficiency trade-offs. We show that LADeQ accelerates coupled cluster singles and doubles (CCSD) and configuration interaction singles and doubles (CISD) calculations while keeping correlation-energy errors within user-specified tolerances, demonstrating autonomous, objective-driven discovery of approximation algorithms inside existing electronic-structure solvers.

AI.tldr: LADeQ是一个由LLM驱动的工作流，能在测试时从零发现、实现并验证新的量子化学近似算法，无需预训练或特定数据，通过加速CCSD/CISD计算并控制误差，展示了自主的、目标驱动的算法发现能力。
AI.motivation: 现有量子化学计算成本高昂且依赖固定近似方案；基础模型（如机器学习势）需大规模预训练，难以适应数据稀疏的前沿化学空间；Agent系统虽能自动化流程，但受限于预定义工具集。需要一种能自主发现新近似算法的方法。
AI.method: LADeQ利用现成的大语言模型（LLM），在测试时从空间统计、电路仿真、核方法等领域借鉴技术，按需构造候选近似方案，并将其直接嵌入现有量子化学代码（如CCSD、CISD）中执行与基准测试。
AI.result: LADeQ成功加速了CCSD和CISD计算，同时将相关能量误差控制在用户指定的容差范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了LLM驱动的自主算法发现能力，突破了传统近似方案选择范围的限制，为量子化学计算中的精度-效率权衡提供了可追溯、透明的控制途径。

title: Total-Lagrangian vectorial lattice Boltzmann method for finite-strain hyperelasticity with curved boundaries
summary: Finite-strain hyperelasticity on curved embedded domains poses a geometric challenge for lattice Boltzmann methods. After streaming across an embedded material surface, the missing population is recovered at the physical cut-link point, where the lattice direction, surface normal, and tangential deformation directions are generally distinct. We develop a total-Lagrangian vectorial lattice Boltzmann method that resolves this geometric mismatch for two- and three-dimensional hyperelastic dynamics. The continuum equations are written as a conservative first-order system for material velocity and deformation gradient. Vector-valued populations are chosen so that their moments recover the state and the material-coordinate Piola fluxes, giving D2Q4\(\times\)6 and D3Q6\(\times\)12 schemes from one \(D\)-dimensional construction. Curved boundaries are embedded by a level set and closed link by link through opposite-population moment identities, cut-link interpolation, and local geometric information at the boundary point. The reconstruction is coupled to a compatibility projection that keeps the recovered displacement aligned with the evolved deformation gradient on embedded active-node graphs. The resulting method extends the previous grid-aligned two-dimensional formulation to curved domains and three-dimensional lattices while retaining explicit collide-stream updates on Cartesian grids. Benchmarks in two and three dimensions show agreement with exact finite-strain fields, nonlinear radial boundary-value problems, and finite-element references.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于弯曲嵌入域有限应变超弹性动力学的总拉格朗日矢量晶格玻尔兹曼方法，解决了流式过程中几何失配问题，并通过D2Q4×6和D3Q6×12格式在二维和三维中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 有限应变超弹性在弯曲嵌入域上存在几何挑战：流式后缺失的种群需要在物理切割点恢复，而晶格方向、表面法向和切向变形方向通常不一致，现有方法无法处理这种几何失配。
AI.method: 将连续方程写为关于材料速度与变形梯度的守恒一阶系统，采用矢量值种群使其矩恢复状态和Piola通量；通过水平集嵌入弯曲边界，基于对立种群矩恒等式、切割点插值和边界局部几何信息逐链重建；结合相容性投影保持位移与变形梯度一致。
AI.result: 在二维和三维基准测试中，与精确有限应变场、非线性径向边值问题和有限元参考结果吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将先前的网格对齐二维公式扩展到弯曲域和三维晶格，同时保留笛卡尔网格上的显式碰撞-流式更新，实现了对复杂几何超弹性动力学的高效模拟。

title: Partition function zeros of quantum many-body systems: perturbative results
summary: A systematic method to find the Yang-Lee partition function zeros of quantum many-body systems based on perturbation theory at finite temperatures was recently introduced in arXiv:2504.01880. This method identifies wave-vector and temperature-dependent complex virtual energies obtainable from the thermal electronic Greens function. The collection of virtual energies over all $\vec{k}$ yield the Yang-Lee zeroes. We apply this approach to the one-dimensional Hubbard model for different boundary conditions. We compare the results obtained by this method up to second-order in perturbation theory with the results found by exact diagonalization. We also propose a quantity that could be used for experimental detection of these zeros of a Hubbard ring. An example of the detection method is presented using exact diagonalization of the 8-site Hubbard ring.

AI.tldr: 本文基于微扰理论提出了一种系统性的方法，用于寻找量子多体系统的杨-李配分函数零点，并将其应用于一维哈伯德模型，通过与精确对角化结果对比验证了二阶微扰理论的准确性，并提出了实验检测哈伯德环零点的可行方案。
AI.motivation: 寻找杨-李配分函数零点是理解相变和临界现象的重要途径，但现有方法对量子多体系统存在计算困难。作者希望发展一种基于微扰理论的系统性方法，使杨-李零点的计算更可行，并探索其在实验中的可观测性。
AI.method: 基于arXiv:2504.01880提出的微扰理论方法，从热电子格林函数中提取与波矢和温度相关的复虚拟能量，通过收集所有波矢的虚拟能量得到杨-李零点。将该方法应用于一维哈伯德模型（不同边界条件），计算至二阶微扰论，并与精确对角化结果对比。
AI.result: 二阶微扰理论的结果与精确对角化结果具有可比性；提出了可用于实验检测哈伯德环零点的可观测量，并基于8格点哈伯德环的精确对角化给出了检测实例。
AI.conclusion: 微扰理论方法能有效计算量子多体系统的杨-李零点，且二阶近似已具备良好准确性；提出的实验检测方案为在哈伯德环系统中观测杨-李零点提供了可能。

title: Scanning-probe quantum sensing of microwave and static magnetic field response of an on-chip superconducting resonator
summary: Superconducting resonators are finding increasing applications in designing advanced quantum circuits for ongoing sensing, metrology, and computing technological revolution. A detailed knowledge of microscopic electromagnetic properties of superconducting resonators is directly relevant for their further improvements on circuitry design and device performance. Here, we introduce scanning-probe quantum microscopy to report nanoscale sensing of microwave and static magnetic field environment of an on-chip niobium (Nb) superconducting resonator. Taking advantage of Rabi oscillation measurements, we show that microwave magnetic fields generated by the superconducting resonator mode can be utilized to achieve coherent control of a quantum spin sensor. We further visualize static electromagnetic field response of the Nb resonator, showing magnetic field-induced formation, evolution, and depinning of superconducting vortices. Our results provide insights into future design, testing and evaluation of solid-state superconducting resonators, highlighting the potential of quantum sensors as a local probe to investigate electromagnetic properties of superconducting quantum circuits.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描探针量子显微镜，通过金刚石NV色心作为量子传感器，对片上铌超导谐振器的微波磁场和静磁场环境进行了纳米级成像，展示了微波磁场对自旋传感器的相干控制以及超导涡旋的成核、演化和脱钉过程。
AI.motivation: 超导谐振器在量子电路中的应用日益广泛，但对其微观电磁特性的详细认知仍不足，这限制了电路设计和器件性能的进一步优化。
AI.method: 采用扫描探针量子显微镜技术，利用金刚石NV色心作为量子自旋传感器，通过拉比振荡测量实现微波磁场的纳米级传感，并对静磁场响应进行成像。
AI.result: 实现了对Nb超导谐振器微波磁场的纳米级探测，展示了微波场对量子自旋传感器的相干控制；可视化了静磁场下超导涡旋的形成、演化和脱钉过程。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为超导谐振器的设计、测试和评估提供了新的微观视角，展示了量子传感器作为局部探针研究超导量子电路电磁特性的潜力。

title: Boosting lattice polarization Mixing the perspectives of geometry optimization and cell-augmentation
summary: Topologically polarized mechanical metamaterials enjoy a special built-in asymmetry that manifests as a preferred localization of edge states on selected edges. While this property has been shown for a few ideal Maxwell lattices, we currently lack systematic criteria to design families of structural systems exhibiting polarization. Here, we propose a framework to design polarized structural configurations enabled by topology optimization (TO), using both band and mode morphological properties as drivers of the optimization algorithm. Through the lens of TO, we are able to tap into a vast design space, unlocking geometric freedom far beyond what is achievable with canonical lattice architectures. At the same time, we elucidate important criteria that need to be satisfied, beyond the optimization outcome, to ensure robustness of the achieved polarization against perturbations of the edge morphology. These results provide the inspiration to loop back into the realm of ideal lattices in search of new configurations characterized by extreme polarization. The peculiar shape and connectivity of the TO-generated lattice offer a blueprint for identifying a new family of Maxwell trusses based on augmented kagome geometry. We demonstrate the achievement of strong polarization signatures up to a three-count edge state mismatch. For all the cases studied, we show agreement between theory, simulations, and experiments, which include laser vibrometry wave measurements on a waterjet-cut specimen and static tests on a 3D-printed prototype.

AI.tldr: 本文通过拓扑优化方法系统性设计具有拓扑极化特性的力学超材料，超越了传统理想Maxwell晶格的局限性，并基于优化结果发现了一种增强kagome几何的新晶格族，实现了高达三阶的边缘态失配的强极化特征，并通过理论、仿真和实验验证了一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前拓扑极化力学超材料仅在少数理想Maxwell晶格中被证实，缺乏系统性设计准则来构建具有极化特性的结构系统，亟需建立一套通用的设计框架以解锁更广阔的设计空间。
AI.method: 提出基于拓扑优化（TO）的设计框架，以能带和模态形态属性作为优化算法驱动力，通过优化生成具有极化特性的结构构型，并基于优化结果识别出增强kagome几何的新Maxwell桁架族。
AI.result: 实现了高达三阶边缘态失配的强极化特征，在所有研究案例中理论、仿真与实验（包括激光测振波测量和水刀切割试件的静态测试）结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑优化方法能够有效设计极化力学超材料，揭示了超越优化结果之外需满足的关键准则以确保极化鲁棒性，并为从理想晶格中寻找新型极端极化构型提供了启示。

title: From Landau Equation and Large Deviations to Efficient Simulations of Dynamical Fluctuations
summary: The (deterministic) Landau equation captures the mean long-term evolution of dynamically hot long-range interacting finite-$N$ systems. Though successful, this kinetic equation fundamentally ignores dynamical fluctuations. Building upon Large Deviation Theory, we present a physically-consistent system of Langevin equations that simultaneously recovers the mean Landau dynamics and accurately captures the corresponding fluctuations among different realizations. We show in particular how these Langevin equations can be derived from Rostoker's principle in the limit of weak two-body deflections. We extensively validate these equations against tailored direct $N$-body simulations, showing an exquisite level of agreement.

AI.tldr: 本文基于大偏差理论，为Landau方程引入了一个自洽的Langevin方程系统，同时捕捉了平均动力学和涨落，并通过N体模拟验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 确定性Landau方程虽然能描述热长程相互作用有限N体系统的长期平均演化，但忽略了动力学涨落，作者希望建立一个能同时捕捉平均行为和涨落的物理自洽理论。
AI.method: 基于大偏差理论，推导出一组自洽的Langevin方程；通过Rostoker原理在弱两体偏转极限下导出该方程；利用直接N体模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 所提出的Langevin方程系统不仅恢复了Landau平均动力学，还准确捕捉了不同实现之间的涨落，与直接N体模拟结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该Langevin框架为热长程相互作用系统的动力学涨落提供了自洽的描述，拓展了Landau理论的应用范围。

title: Nontrivial Boundary-Mediated Superconducting Transport in a TRSB Topological Iron-Based Superconductor
summary: The interplay of superconductivity, band topology, and spontaneous time-reversal-symmetry breaking (TRSB) is expected to enable topological superconducting boundary states. FeTe0.55Se0.45 provides a promising single-material platform because it combines superconductivity, nontrivial band topology, and spontaneous magnetization in the superconducting state. Here we report evidence for a boundary-mediated superconducting transport response in exfoliated Fe(Te,Se) devices. Polar Kerr measurements show that TRSB emerges below TKerr < Tc and coexists with superconductivity across multiple compositions, providing an independent symmetry-breaking scale for transport. Using crystallographically sharp, continuous edges and side-surface-dominant contacts, we find that topological FeTe0.55Se0.45 exhibits an anomalous conductance plateau absent in topologically trivial FeTe0.40Se0.60 and Fe1.02Te0.55Se0.45 under comparable measurements. This plateau requires uninterrupted sharp edges connecting source and drain, persists over micrometer-scale separations far exceeding the bulk coherence length, shows strongly suppressed thermal broadening, and collapses when the drain is moved to the top surface. Its temperature evolution follows the TRSB scale: the plateau remains weakly broadened below T*Kerr and disappears near TKerr rather than Tc. These doping-selective, edge-geometry-dependent, TRSB-correlated, and long-range nonlocal signatures establish experimental criteria for identifying boundary-mediated superconducting transport in FeTe0.55Se0.45 and motivate phase-sensitive and theoretical studies of its microscopic origin.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在Fe(Te,Se)器件中发现边界介导的超导输运响应，包括异常电导平台、时间反演对称性破缺等特征，这些特征与拓扑边界态相关。
AI.motivation: 探索超导、能带拓扑与自发时间反演对称性破缺的相互作用，以期实现拓扑超导边界态，寻找单一材料平台中的实验证据。
AI.method: 通过极地Kerr测量、剥离Fe(Te,Se)器件、边缘接触与顶面接触对比实验、不同掺杂组分对比等方法，系统研究边界介导的超导输运行为。
AI.result: 1. TRSB在Tc以下出现并与超导共存；2. 拓扑非平庸的FeTe0.55Se0.45展现出异常电导平台，在拓扑平庸组分中缺失；3. 该平台依赖于连续尖锐边缘、微米级长程传输、弱热展宽等特征；4. 平台温度演化与TRSB尺度（TKerr）一致，而非Tc。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了识别FeTe0.55Se0.45中边界介导超导输运的实验标准，包括掺杂选择性、边缘几何依赖性、TRSB关联性和长程非局域性，为后续相位敏感和理论研究提供了基础。

title: Empowering Polymeric Materials Discovery by Artificial Intelligence
summary: Polymeric materials underpin modern technologies spanning energy storage, microelectronics, healthcare and sustainable manufacturing. Yet their rational design remains exceptionally challenging because material performance emerges from complex interactions among molecular composition, chain architecture, processing history and hierarchical structural evolution across multiple length and time scales. Consequently, polymer research has long relied on labor-intensive experimentation and fragmented modeling approaches, limiting both mechanistic understanding and innovation efficiency. Recent advances in data infrastructure, machine learning, large artificial intelligence (AI) models and laboratory automation are beginning to reshape this landscape. Rather than functioning as isolated tools, polymer databases, predictive models, AI agents and automated laboratories are increasingly converging into interconnected discovery ecosystems. As a result, the central challenge is shifting from improving predictive accuracy alone to enabling reliable decision-making, adaptive learning and seamless integration across computation, experimentation and scientific reasoning. We argue that polymer science is entering an era of autonomous discovery, in which data, simulation, reasoning and experimentation operate within self-improving feedback loops that continuously generate hypotheses, design materials, execute experiments and refine predictive models. By unifying molecular design, process optimization, experimental validation and industrial translation, such autonomous ecosystems establish a more predictive, reproducible and scalable paradigm for polymer innovation, fundamentally transforming how polymer research is conducted.

AI.tldr: 本文提出高分子科学正进入自主发现时代，通过数据、模拟、推理与实验的闭环反馈系统，实现从分子设计到工业转化的全链条自动化创新范式。
AI.motivation: 高分子的理性设计极其困难，因为其性能取决于分子组成、链结构、加工历史和跨尺度结构演化之间的复杂相互作用，传统实验和碎片化建模方法效率低下，限制了机理理解和创新效率。
AI.method: 整合高分子数据库、机器学习、大型AI模型和实验室自动化技术，构建相互连通的自发现生态系统，形成数据-模拟-推理-实验的自我改进反馈闭环，实现假设生成、材料设计、实验执行和模型优化的自动化循环。
AI.result: 打破了传统孤立工具的使用模式，实现了从提高预测精度到可靠决策、自适应学习和跨计算-实验-科学推理无缝集成的范式转变。
AI.conclusion: 高分子科学正在向自主发现时代演进，通过统一分子设计、工艺优化、实验验证和工业转化，建立更具预测性、可重复性和可扩展性的创新范式，将从根本上改变高分子研究的方式。

title: Input-schema identifiability limits in physics-informed surrogates for mechanics-governed flow
comment: Main text with Supplementary Information included; 11 figures
summary: Physics-informed and data-driven surrogates are increasingly used to approximate mechanics-governed flow fields, but the target quantities assigned to such models are not always identifiable from the input variables available at prediction time. We introduce an input-schema identifiability certificate for computational surrogates. Starting from a reduced physical model, the certificate decomposes a target field into components that are measurable from geometry, components that require boundary-condition information, and components identifiable only up to a symmetry quotient. This yields a pre-training audit: it predicts which oracle-channel interventions should reduce error, which should fail, and which ambiguity cannot be removed by changing the architecture, loss, optimizer, or sample size. We instantiate the framework for incompressible tubular flow using a Cosserat-rod reduction, where lumen velocity separates into a mesh-measurable tangent direction, a boundary-condition-dependent magnitude, and a signed-orientation ambiguity. Controlled experiments on patient-specific aortic CFD geometries, analytic Womersley flows, and an advection-diffusion transfer problem confirm the predicted pattern: supplying signed direction collapses angular error to the oracle regime, whereas supplying magnitude without orientation leaves the predicted sign ambiguity and yields 16-33 percent per-node sign flips. The results provide a mechanics-based diagnostic for deciding whether a surrogate modelling task is physically identifiable before training, and expose failure modes that aggregate error metrics can hide.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向计算代理模型的输入模式可辨识性认证方法，通过降维物理模型将目标场分解为几何可测分量、边界条件相关分量和仅对称性可辨识分量，从而在训练前预测哪些干预能降低误差、哪些会失败、哪些歧义无法消除。在不可压缩管流中的验证表明，提供有符号方向可消除角度误差，而仅提供大小则会导致16-33%的符号翻转。
AI.motivation: 物理信息与数据驱动的代理模型越来越广泛地用于近似力学控制流场，但分配给这些模型的目标量在预测时并不总是能从输入变量中识别出来，导致建模任务可能存在不可辨识性而未被察觉。
AI.method: 提出输入模式可辨识性认证方法。从降维物理模型出发，将目标场分解为：几何可测分量、需要边界条件信息的分量、仅在某个对称商下可辨识的分量。以此作为训练前审计工具。在不可压缩管流中，使用Cosserat-rod约化将管腔速度分解为网格可测的切向方向、依赖边界条件的大小和有符号方向歧义。
AI.result: 在患者特异性主动脉CFD几何、解析Womersley流和对流扩散传输问题上的实验验证了预测模式：提供有符号方向将角度误差降至oracle水平；而提供大小但不提供方向则产生预期的符号歧义，导致16-33%的逐节点符号翻转。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种基于力学的诊断工具，可在训练前判断代理建模任务物理上是否可辨识，并揭示了聚合误差指标可能隐藏的失败模式。

title: Displacement-Field-Driven Semimetal-Superconductor Transition in Magic-Angle Twisted Trilayer Graphene
summary: Magic-angle twisted trilayer graphene(MATTG) hosts versatile displacement-field-tuned correlated phenomena. MATTG consists of a dispersive Dirac cone which hybridizes with the flat band from a twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) sector. The hybridization strength increases with the displacement field $D$ and naively one may expect D-driven heavy fermion physics. However, the TBG Hubbard bands have a momentum-selective Mott gap, which is small at the $Γ$ point due to the band topology, and a rigid local moment description as in the familiar Kondo lattice model is invalid. Here we show that the dominant effect of the displacement field is to induce an energy shift of the Dirac cone and self-doping into the TBG sector. We illustrate this picture in a concrete calculation using a slave-particle theory at the filling $ν=\pm 2$. We find that increasing $D$ drives a transition from a semimetal into a superconducting state. We also discuss the enhancement of the superconductivity by $D$ near $ν=\pm2$ and the particle-hole asymmetry of the phase diagram. Our results provide a unified picture for electric-field-tunable superconductivity, Mottness, and heavy-fermion-like behavior in MATTG.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了魔角扭转三层石墨烯(MATTG)中位移场调控的关联现象，提出位移场的主要作用是引起狄拉克锥的能量移动和自掺杂，而非传统的重费米子物理。通过奴隶粒子理论计算，发现位移场增加可驱动半金属到超导态的转变，并解释了近ν=±2处超导增强及相图的粒子-空穴不对称性。
AI.motivation: MATTG中位移场可调控多种关联现象，但传统重费米子模型因TBG哈伯德带具有动量选择的Mott能隙而失效，需要建立新的理论框架来统一理解电场可调超导、Mott行为和重费米子现象。
AI.method: 采用奴隶粒子理论（slave-particle theory），在填充数ν=±2处进行具体计算，分析位移场D对能带结构的影响。
AI.result: 增加位移场D会驱动从半金属态到超导态的转变；在近ν=±2处，D能增强超导电性；相图呈现粒子-空穴不对称性。
AI.conclusion: 位移场的主要效应是引起狄拉克锥能量移动和向TBG层的自掺杂，而非传统的重费米子物理，为理解MATTG中电场可调的超导、Mott行为和类重费米子现象提供了统一图像。

title: Observation of Berry curvature fluctuations from incipient polar order in an oxide interface
summary: Diagnosing hidden local orders at buried interfaces remains a central challenge in the design and characterization of quantum materials. Second-order electrical responses, such as the nonlinear Hall effect, probe inversion-symmetry-breaking terms invisible to linear transport, offering a direct window into these nanoscale environments via the quantum geometry of Bloch electrons. Here, we utilize $\text{KTaO}_3$, a complex oxide driven by strong tantalum $5d$ spin-orbit coupling and interfacial inversion symmetry breaking, to demonstrate that second-harmonic resistivities exhibit large, reproducible mesoscopic fluctuations. Remarkably, these fluctuations persist in macroscopically large ($200\,μ\text{m}$) devices and are ubiquitous across all studied surface orientations, even where macroscopic conductivity strictly adheres to underlying crystal symmetries. We propose that these robust, magnetic-field-driven interference patterns arise from local structural symmetry breaking, driven by incipient ferroelectric polarization pinned to the interfacial impurity landscape. This defect-pinned polar mechanism is firmly supported by the signal's suppression above $10\text{ K}$ due to phase decoherence, and a complete loss of mesoscopic memory upon thermal cycling above $40\text{ K}$. By linking quantum geometry to dynamic lattice ordering, our findings establish nonlinear mesoscopic transport as a powerful new characterization tool, capable of revealing local polar tendencies and hidden structural orders in complex materials that remain fundamentally invisible to conventional probes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用KTaO₃氧化物界面，发现非线性霍尔效应中二次谐波电阻率存在宏观尺度（200μm）下仍可观测的介观涨落，并将其归因于界面杂质钉扎导致的局域铁电极化破缺，为探测隐藏结构序提供了新工具。
AI.motivation: 诊断埋藏界面的隐藏局域序是量子材料设计与表征的核心挑战，传统线性输运对反演对称性破缺不敏感，亟需开发新的探测手段。
AI.method: 利用KTaO₃氧化物界面（强Ta 5d自旋轨道耦合+界面反演对称破缺），测量二次谐波电阻率；通过温度依赖和热循环实验验证介观涨落的起源。
AI.result: 二次谐波电阻率在宏观尺寸（200μm）器件中表现出大幅、可重复的介观涨落；该现象在所有表面取向普遍存在；10K以上信号因退相干被抑制；40K以上热循环后介观记忆完全消失。
AI.conclusion: 非线性介观输运是一种强力的新表征工具，能揭示传统探针无法观测的局域极化倾向和隐藏结构序，将量子几何与动态晶格有序联系起来。

title: Magnetic Anisotropy and Metamagnetic Transitions in Er3Pt2Sb4.55 with A Distorted Square Net Lattice
summary: Magnetic materials with square-net sublattices are of great interest due to its potential to realize magnetic frustration. Here we report the crystal growth and structural, magnetic, thermodynamic and electronic transport properties of a new rare-earth-based intermetallic compound, Er3Pt2Sb4.55(5). The new material possesses a distorted square-net framework of Er. Magnetic properties measurements suggest anisotropic behavior, long-range antiferromagnetic ordering and metamagnetic transitions based on a Jeff = 1/2 Er3+ motif. A magnetic structure is proposed based on the observed magnetic and thermodynamic properties. This new material expands the R3Pt2Sb4+x family with distorted square-net lattice of rare-earth elements and offers a new opportunity to study the relationship between magnetic ordering, crystal-electric field effect and crystal structure in rare-earth-based compounds.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种具有扭曲方形网格亚晶格的新型稀土金属间化合物Er3Pt2Sb4.55(5)的晶体生长、结构、磁性、热力学和电子输运性质，该材料表现出各向异性行为、长程反铁磁有序和基于Jeff=1/2 Er3+构型的变磁相变。
AI.motivation: 具有方形网格亚晶格的磁性材料因其实现磁阻挫的潜力而备受关注，作者旨在探索此类新材料并研究其结构与磁性之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过晶体生长合成Er3Pt2Sb4.55(5)，并对其结构、磁性、热力学和电子输运性质进行系统表征。
AI.result: 该材料具有扭曲的Er方形网格框架，表现出各向异性磁性行为、长程反铁磁有序以及基于Jeff=1/2 Er3+构型的变磁相变，并提出了可能的磁结构。
AI.conclusion: 该新材料扩展了具有扭曲方形网格稀土晶格的R3Pt2Sb4+x家族，为研究稀土化合物中磁有序、晶场效应与晶体结构之间的关系提供了新的机会。

title: Nonreciprocal Disorder Prevents Zero-Temperature Freezing in a Ferromagnet
summary: Nonreciprocal interactions underpin diverse nonequilibrium phenomena, yet the effects of quenched nonreciprocity in extended systems remain largely unexplored. We study a $2d$ Ising model with randomly distributed nonreciprocal bonds at density $p$, finding a continuous nonequilibrium transition down to $T=0$ with finite $p_c$. A gauge-invariance argument yields $p_c(T)\leq1/2$, and mean-field theory predicts a qualitatively correct phase diagram. Unlike equilibrium disordered models, the zero-temperature dynamics remains active, with athermal rare-region reversals and logarithmic "activated" coarsening.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维Ising模型中随机非互易键的淬火无序效应，发现连续非平衡相变、活性零温动力学及对数粗化行为。
AI.motivation: 扩展系统中淬火非互易性的效应尚未被充分探索，特别是与平衡无序系统行为的对比。
AI.method: 在二维Ising模型中引入随机分布的非互易键（密度p），结合规范不变性论证和平均场理论分析，并研究零温动力学。
AI.result: 发现连续非平衡相变延伸至T=0（有限p_c）；规范论证给出p_c(T)≤1/2；零温动力学活跃，出现非热稀区反转和对数“激活”粗化。
AI.conclusion: 非互易无序系统展现出与平衡无序系统根本不同的行为，零温下仍保持动力学活性。

title: Symmetry-Enforced Pair-Density Wave and Chiral Interband Superconductivity in Strongly Correlated Kagome Systems
comment: Main: 7 pages, 2 figures. Supplementary: 13 pages, 5 figures
summary: The pair-density wave (PDW) state, characterized by Cooper pairing at finite momentum, is a long-sought superconducting phase whose possible realization in Kagome metals is particularly intriguing in the strongly correlated regime. We investigate superconductivity in the extended $t$-$J$ model on the Kagome lattice and show that the symmetry-enforced sublattice structure of the Bloch wavefunctions gives rise to a rich landscape of unconventional pairing states. When the chemical potential is tuned to a sublattice-pure ($p$-type) van Hove singularity (vHS), a PDW state inevitably emerges. Near the $m'$-type vHS, which features opposite mirror eigenvalues to the conventional $m$-type vHS, intraband chiral, uniform, and nematic pairing states compete. When further-neighbor hoppings drive the $p$- and $m'$-type vHSs towards near degeneracy, phase frustration in the interband pairing channel stabilizes a chiral interband state. Our results reveal the previously overlooked $m'$-type vHS as a distinct route to unconventional superconductivity rooted in electronic correlations and mirror-symmetry-constrained Bloch wavefunctions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Kagome晶格扩展t-J模型中的超导电性，发现对称性约束的布洛赫波函数子晶格结构导致丰富的非常规配对态。当化学势调谐到p型范霍夫奇点时，必然出现PDW态；在m'型vHS附近，手性、均匀和向列配对态相互竞争；当p型和m'型vHS接近简并时，能带间配对通道的相位竞争稳定了手性带间态。
AI.motivation: 探索Kagome金属中强关联 regime 下有限动量库珀配对（PDW态）的实现可能性，揭示之前被忽视的m'型范霍夫奇点作为非常规超导的新路径。
AI.method: 在Kagome晶格的扩展t-J模型框架下，通过分析布洛赫波函数的对称性约束子晶格结构，研究不同范霍夫奇点（p型、m型、m'型）附近的超导配对态，并考虑近邻跃迁对能带简并的影响。
AI.result: 1) p型vHS处必然出现PDW态；2) m'型vHS处存在手性、均匀、向列配对态的竞争；3) p型和m'型vHS接近简并时，能带间配对通道的相位竞争稳定了手性带间态。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了m'型vHS作为非常规超导的独特路径，其根源在于电子关联和镜面对称性约束的布洛赫波函数。

title: A large-scale foundation model enables simulation-to-real adaptation for nuclear magnetic resonance-based molecular structure analysis
summary: Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) spectroscopy is a powerful tool for molecular structure analysis, and spectral artificial intelligence offers great potential for its rapid and automated interpretation. However, the scarcity of experimental NMR datasets has constrained deep learning in this domain to narrow, task-specific applications that lack broad generalization. Here, we introduce UltraNMR, a large-scale foundation model for NMR that leverages the intrinsic properties of NMR spectra to learn generalizable spectral representations. We collected 158 million paired simulated $^{1}$H and $^{13}$C NMR spectra to train UltraNMR, employing multiple domain-specific pre-training objectives. UltraNMR captures both intra-spectral and inter-spectral dependencies, enabling seamless simulation-to-real adaptation. We demonstrate that adapting UltraNMR to a range of molecular structure analysis tasks on experimental NMR spectra consistently yields state-of-the-art performance and clearly outperforms UltraNMR variants trained directly on downstream data without simulation pre-training. We also construct a large-scale NMR spectral vector library by encoding simulated NMR spectra using UltraNMR, covering 94 million unique molecules and enabling effective structure-aware retrieval. In real-world applications, UltraNMR facilitates the structural elucidation of two previously unknown natural products from Chinese herbal medicines recorded in the Chinese Pharmacopoeia. These results suggest that large-scale simulation pre-training can effectively bridge the simulation-to-real gap, enabling robust and generalizable molecular structure analysis of real-world NMR spectra.

AI.tldr: UltraNMR是一个基于1.58亿对模拟核磁共振谱训练的大规模基础模型，通过领域特定的预训练目标学习可泛化的谱图表示，在多个实验核磁共振谱分析任务上达到最先进的性能，并成功用于解析中药中两种未知天然产物的结构。
AI.motivation: 实验核磁共振数据稀缺，导致深度学习在该领域只能应用于狭窄、任务特定的场景，缺乏广泛泛化能力。因此需要一种能学习通用核磁共振谱图表示的大规模基础模型。
AI.method: 收集1.58亿对模拟¹H和¹³C核磁共振谱，采用多个领域特定的预训练目标进行训练。模型捕捉谱内和谱间依赖关系，实现从模拟到真实的无缝适应。此外，用UltraNMR编码模拟谱构建了包含9400万独特分子的大规模谱向量库，支持结构感知的检索。
AI.result: 在多个实验核磁共振谱分子结构分析任务上持续取得最先进性能，并明显优于未经模拟预训练直接在下游数据上训练的UltraNMR变体。成功解析了中国药典中两种未知天然产物的结构。
AI.conclusion: 大规模模拟预训练可以有效弥合模拟与真实核磁共振谱之间的差距，实现对真实世界核磁共振谱进行鲁棒且可泛化的分子结构分析。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for coupled stiff transport systems
summary:
Purpose: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) struggle with stiff, regime-changing transport equations due to instability, loss imbalance, and violations of physical consistency. This paper investigates these failures through the Marshak wave equations - a canonical benchmark from radiative transport - where initial and boundary conditions differ by up to 12 orders of magnitude, and proposes targeted modifications to the standard PINN framework to overcome them.
  Design/methodology/approach: Three modifications are introduced: (1) a ScaledSigmoid final activation enforcing physical bounds and positivity of the unknowns; (2) a logarithmic MSE loss replacing the standard quadratic loss for initial and boundary conditions, enabling training across extreme scale disparities; and (3) explicit enforcement of global conservation laws derived from the governing equations as an additional physics loss term. Monte Carlo sampling with exponential time weighting is used throughout.
  Findings: The proposed framework successfully recovers the Marshak wave dynamics - including the hot, cold, and wave-front regions - in agreement with a reference Implicit Monte Carlo solution, with run times under 30 minutes. Ablation studies confirm that each ingredient is essential: linear activation, absence of the logarithmic loss, or removal of the PDE term each independently cause the method to fail qualitatively.
  Originality/value: This work identifies and resolves three concrete failure modes of standard PINNs on stiff hyperbolic systems with nonlinear coupling. The combination of bounded activations, scale-aware loss functions, and conservation law enforcement constitutes a novel and practically validated framework, with applicability to radiative transport and other coupled stiff PDE systems in engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文针对PINNs在刚性输运方程（以Marshak波方程为例）中失效的问题，提出了三项改进：ScalingSigmoid激活函数保证物理边界、对数MSE损失处理极端尺度差异、显式全局守恒律约束。实验在30分钟内成功复现Marshak波动力学，消融实验证实每项改进都不可或缺。
AI.motivation: 标准PINNs在处理刚性、状态突变的输运方程时存在不稳定、损失函数不平衡和物理一致性被违反的问题。作者以Marshak波方程（初始与边界条件相差12个数量级）为基准，揭示这些失败模式，并希望提出针对性改进。
AI.method: (1) ScaledSigmoid激活函数：限制网络输出在物理上下界内，保证未知数正定性；(2) 对数MSE损失：替代标准二次损失处理初始/边界条件，适应极端尺度差异；(3) 显式施加全局守恒律：将方程推导出的守恒律作为额外物理损失项。同时使用蒙特卡洛采样与指数时间加权。
AI.result: 成功恢复Marshak波动力学（热区、冷区、波前区域），与隐式蒙特卡洛参考解一致，运行时间<30分钟。消融实验表明：线性激活、无对数损失、去除PDE项分别导致方法定性失败。
AI.conclusion: 本文识别并解决了标准PINNs在刚性双曲系统上的三个具体失败模式。有界激活、尺度感知损失函数和守恒律约束的组合构成了新颖且经实践验证的框架，可推广到辐射输运及其他刚性耦合PDE系统。

title: Importance of effective Coulomb interactions for $T_c$ in cuprates
summary: Cuprate superconductors exhibit the highest observed superconducting $T_c$ at atmospheric pressure. However, the magnitude of $T_c$ varies significantly between different cuprates. At present, it is unclear what properties of the crystal structure affect $T_c$ most strongly, yet such an understanding must underpin any efforts toward high-$T_c$ materials design. To address this issue, we perform a large scale systematic study, employing a combination of data collection, state-of-the-art numerical methods, and statistical analysis. We identify about 40 different cuprate compounds, and we compile detailed data about their $T_c$'s and crystal structures from literature and the available databases. Using a fully automated procedure, for each compound we compute the DFT bandstructure and downfold it to two of the most commonly studied low-energy lattice models, namely the single-band Hubbard and the three-band Emery models. The downfolding is based on the approach of MLWFs and cRPA. Finally, we apply a thorough and unbiased statistical analysis to investigate the correlations between the experimentally measured $T_c$'s and the computed parameters of our theoretical models. Our data indicates that more sophisticated models might be needed to describe all cuprates on the same footing. Nevertheless, we find that $T_c$ scales well with simple functions of model parameters. We confirm a previously observed trend that $t'$ in the single-band model correlates with the experimental $T_c$, and we find that $T_c$ appears to vanish below a finite value of $t'$, in agreement with recent ground-state calculations for the Hubbard model. However, we find that the coupling strength also plays a role: throughout our entire dataset, $T_c$ correlates the most with the Coulomb coupling on the $p$-orbitals in the 3-band model, highlighting the importance of the oxygen sites in the copper-oxide planes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模系统研究，收集了约40种铜氧化物超导体的晶体结构数据和Tc值，利用DFT能带计算和MLWF/cRPA方法将体系映射到单带Hubbard和三带Emery模型，并通过统计分析发现：Tc与单带模型中的t'参数正相关且存在有限阈值，同时Tc与三带模型中氧位点上的库仑耦合强度关联最强，强调了铜氧面中氧位点的重要性。
AI.motivation: 铜氧化物超导体在常压下具有最高的超导临界温度Tc，但不同铜氧化物之间的Tc差异很大。目前尚不清楚晶体结构的哪些性质对Tc影响最大，而理解这一点是设计高温超导材料的基础。
AI.method: 从文献和数据库中收集约40种铜氧化物的Tc和晶体结构数据；采用全自动流程进行DFT能带计算，并通过MLWF（最大局域化Wannier函数）和cRPA（约束随机相位近似）方法下折叠到单带Hubbard模型和三带Emery模型；最后进行无偏统计分析，探究实验Tc与模型参数之间的相关性。
AI.result: 更复杂的模型可能才足以统一描述所有铜氧化物；Tc与单带模型中的t'参数呈良好标度关系，且Tc在t'低于某一有限值时消失；在整个数据集中，Tc与三带模型中p轨道上的库仑耦合强度相关性最强。
AI.conclusion: 确认了先前观察到的单带模型中t'与Tc相关的趋势，并发现Tc在有限t'值以下消失（与Hubbard模型基态计算结果一致）；强调了铜氧面中氧位点的重要性，即氧位点上的库仑耦合是影响Tc的关键因素。

title: Observation and Control of Spontaneous Magnon Emission from Spin Ensembles in 2D Hexagonal Boron Nitride
summary: Hybrid systems consisting of color centers and magnetic materials provide an appealing solid-state platform for advancing the burgeoning quantum technological revolution. Exploring novel coupling mechanisms between optically active spin defects and quantum degrees of freedom is directly relevant in this context. Here, we report observation and control of spontaneous magnon emission from boron-vacancy centers in 2D hexagonal boron nitride (hBN), an unconventional qubit-magnon dipole coupling channel that dominates in the near-zero temperature limit. The spontaneous magnon emission process starts to be overshadowed by thermal magnon effect as temperature increases, reflecting the crossover from an emission-dominated, effectively cold magnon reservoir to a thermally occupied spin bath where absorption and stimulated processes restore balance. By increasing the spin defect density, we further present that spontaneous magnon emission into a common spin bath could help establish quantum correlations in dense hBN spin ensembles. Our results are quantitatively captured by detailed theoretical modeling, bringing insights into understanding qubit-magnon coupling, correlated spin dynamics, and many-body physics of color centers in the quantum regime.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在二维六方氮化硼（hBN）中硼空位中心的自发自旋波（magnon）发射现象，这是一种在极低温下占主导的新型量子比特-磁振子耦合通道。随着温度升高，该过程被热磁振子效应掩盖，体现从发射主导的冷磁振子库到热占据自旋浴的转变。通过增加自旋缺陷密度，自发磁振子发射可帮助建立密集hBN自旋系综中的量子关联。理论建模定量捕获了实验结果。
AI.motivation: 探索色心与磁性材料混合系统中光学活性自旋缺陷与量子自由度之间的新颖耦合机制，为量子技术革命提供固态平台。
AI.method: 实验观测二维hBN中硼空位中心的自发磁振子发射，结合温度依赖性测量和自旋缺陷密度调控，辅以详细理论建模进行定量分析。
AI.result: 首次观察到并控制了hBN中硼空位中心的自发磁振子发射，揭示了其随温度从发射主导到热平衡的交叉行为，以及高密度下通过共同自旋浴建立量子关联的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解量子比特-磁振子耦合、关联自旋动力学以及色心在量子领域的多体物理提供了新见解，推动混合量子系统的发展。

title: Silicon Nanostructures for Biosensing: From Field-Effect Transistors to Photonic Resonators, and the Long Road to the Clinic
summary: Silicon has a unique combination of properties that makes it one of the best material choices for biosensor platforms: it is inexpensive, its native oxide is atomically smooth, its fabrication processes are CMOS-compatible and have been refined for more than three decades, and it can support many transduction mechanisms in biosensor design. Over the past thirty years, researchers and engineers have used silicon nanostructures to produce ion-sensitive transistors, ultrasensitive nanowire field-effect biosensors, refractive-index-based porous silicon films, microring photonic resonators, suspended cantilevers, luminescent quantum dots, and solid-state nanopores. These device families have demonstrated successful sensing capabilities at the single-molecule, single-virus, or sub-femtomolar level under laboratory conditions; however, they have rarely been widely deployed in clinical assays. This gap is mainly caused by several well-characterized bottlenecks: for nanowire BioFETs, device variability and Debye screening; for porous silicon, fouling, pore wetting, and surface stability; for silicon photonics, thermal drift, spectral readout, and packaging; and across all platforms, calibration, reproducibility, and validation in real biofluids. In this review, we trace the development of silicon biosensors from their early stages to their current state, search and organize the literature focusing on the three most mature platforms and a set of emerging directions, summarize and compare the performance and bottlenecks of different platforms, and argue that progress over the next decade will come primarily from integrated readout, interface engineering, and systematic benchmarking rather than from the discovery of new silicon nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了硅基生物传感器的发展历程，重点分析了纳米线BioFET、多孔硅和硅光子学三大成熟平台及其新兴方向，指出当前硅基传感器虽在实验室条件下表现出色，但由于器件变异性、德拜屏蔽、污染、热漂移等问题，难以在临床中广泛部署。作者认为未来十年突破的重点在于集成读出、界面工程和系统基准测试，而非发现新型硅纳米结构。
AI.motivation: 硅基生物传感器在实验室条件下已实现单分子、单病毒或亚飞摩尔级检测，但未能广泛应用于临床检测。本文旨在梳理三大成熟平台的发展现状，识别其关键瓶颈，并指出未来发展的可行方向。
AI.method: 本文采用文献综述方法，系统检索并组织以纳米线BioFET、多孔硅和硅光子学三大成熟平台及若干新兴方向为核心的文献，对它们的性能与瓶颈进行总结和比较。
AI.result: 识别出各平台的主要瓶颈：纳米线BioFET面临器件变异性和德拜屏蔽；多孔硅存在污染、孔隙润湿和表面稳定性问题；硅光子学受限于热漂移、光谱读出和封装；所有平台均面临校准、可重复性和真实生物流体验证的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来十年硅基生物传感器的突破将主要来自集成读出、界面工程和系统基准测试，而非发现新型硅纳米结构。

title: Heavy-Tailed Dispersal Kernels from Stopped Subdiffusive Fractional Brownian Motion
summary: Subdiffusive fractional Brownian motions produce localized aggregation when particles are stopped at exponentially distributed times. In applications where clumping and long-distance dispersal events are observed simultaneously, such as in some instances of seed dispersal, this model fails to describe the tails of the data. The resulting redistribution kernel has only an exponentially decaying tail, whereas a heavier tail is needed for modeling the long-distance dispersal observed. Here we propose a model in which subdiffusive particles stop at exponentially distributed times, but with a rate parameter that is Gamma distributed. This heterogeneity in stopping rates causes the density of final radial positions to have a heavy-tailed distribution. Our model retains the strong localized clumping characteristic of subdiffusive fractional Brownian motion while simultaneously generating the heavy tails required for realistic long-distance dispersal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异质性停止速率的次扩散分数布朗运动模型，通过引入Gamma分布的停止速率参数，在保持次扩散过程强局部聚集特性的同时，生成重尾分布，以同时模拟种子扩散中的聚集和远距离扩散事件。
AI.motivation: 现有次扩散分数布朗运动模型在粒子以指数分布时间停止时，只能产生指数衰减的核，无法描述实际应用中（如种子扩散）同时出现的聚集和重尾远距离扩散现象。
AI.method: 在次扩散分数布朗运动基础上，将停止时间的速率参数设为Gamma分布（而非固定值），使得粒子的停止速率具有异质性，从而最终径向位置密度呈现重尾分布。
AI.result: 该模型在保留次扩散分数布朗运动强局部聚集特性的同时，成功生成了重尾分布，满足了远距离扩散建模的需求。
AI.conclusion: 异质性停止速率的次扩散模型能够同时捕捉局部聚集和远距离扩散两种看似矛盾的现象，为种子扩散等应用提供了更真实的建模工具。

title: Non-BCS Pairing by a Singular Dynamical Interaction
summary: This review examines the theory of superconductivity in systems with {\em singular dynamical} electron-electron interaction and contrasts it with a conventional BCS superconductivity. Examples include metals near a Quantum Critical Point, quantum dots and system near a localization (Mott) transition. We show, that the singular interaction destroys the traditional separation of energy scales, invalidating the significance of Cooper logarithm, and, as the consequence, the whole BCS framework. We explore the universal model with dynamical interaction $Γ(Ω) \propto 1/|Ω|^γ$ (the $γ$-model) and analyze the competition/interplay between the tendency towards pairing and towards non-Fermi liquid behavior. We show that superconductivity still develops once the pairing interaction exceeds a certain threshold, but the origin of the pairing is qualitatively different from that in BCS theory. We show that the gap equation at $T=0$ has an infinite set of topologically distinct solutions. These solution disappear one by one once the pairing interaction becomes non-singular (massive). We review the physics underlying these phenomena and outline future directions.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了具有奇异动态电子-电子相互作用的系统中的超导理论，并与传统BCS超导进行对比。研究显示，奇异相互作用破坏了传统能级分离，使Cooper对数失效，从而颠覆BCS框架。作者探索了动态相互作用Γ(Ω) ∝ 1/|Ω|^γ的通用γ模型，分析了配对倾向与非费米液体行为之间的竞争。研究表明超导仍需配对相互作用超过阈值，但其起源与BCS理论有本质区别，且零温能隙方程存在无限多个拓扑不同的解，这些解在配对相互作用变为非奇异（有质量）时逐一消失。
AI.motivation: 传统BCS理论基于费米液体理论和弱耦合近似，但许多现实系统（如量子临界点附近的金属、量子点和局域化转变系统）中电子-电子相互作用具有奇异的动态特性，导致BCS框架不再适用。本文旨在系统分析奇异动态相互作用下的超导机制，揭示其与传统BCS超导的本质区别。
AI.method: 采用通用γ模型，其中动态相互作用Γ(Ω) ∝ 1/|Ω|^γ，通过分析零温能隙方程研究配对相互作用强度与超导之间的关系，探索能隙方程解的拓扑结构及其随相互作用性质变化的演化规律。
AI.result: 1) 奇异动态相互作用破坏了传统能级分离，使Cooper对数失效，BCS框架整体不再适用；2) 超导仍可在配对相互作用超过阈值时发生，但配对起源定性不同于BCS理论；3) 零温能隙方程存在无限多个拓扑不同的解；4) 当配对相互作用变为非奇异（有质量）时，这些解逐一消失。
AI.conclusion: 奇异动态相互作用系统中的超导配对机制与BCS理论有本质差异，能隙方程的多解特性揭示了此类系统的丰富物理内涵。该研究为理解量子临界点、量子点和Mott转变等系统中的非常规超导提供了理论框架，并为未来探索非费米液体与超导的相互作用指明了方向。

title: Rothe's Method for Quantum Dynamics in Atoms and Molecules with Gaussian Wavepackets
summary: Capable of capturing both bound and continuum quantum dynamics, Gaussian wavepackets are highly attractive basis functions for simulating laser-driven processes in atoms and molecules. Unfortunately, fully flexible Gaussian wavepackets are exceedingly challenging to propagate in a numerically stable manner within the framework of conventional time-dependent variational principles. In this chapter, we discuss the sources of the numerical issues and review an alternative approach, Rothe's method, that offers a route to improved numerical stability. Recent proof-of-concept simulations based on Rothe's method indicate that Gaussian wavepackets provide results on par with highly accurate grid-based methods for both electronic and rovibrational quantum dynamics, including ultrafast nonlinear processes that involve the continuum such as high-harmonic generation. Remarkably few Gaussian wavepackets are needed to achieve the high accuracy of grid-based approaches, indicating that further algorithmic developments and efficient implementations may enable efficient simulations of not only electronic and rovibrational phenomena but also fully coupled electronic-nuclear quantum dynamics with significantly reduced memory demands. We also point out remaining practical challenges, including matrix elements of the squared Hamiltonian and the treatment of Coulomb cusps.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了高斯波包在模拟激光驱动原子分子动力学中的数值稳定性问题，介绍了Rothe方法作为替代方案，该方法能实现与高精度网格法相当的结果，且仅需少量高斯波包即可达到高精度，有望用于电子-核耦合量子动力学模拟。
AI.motivation: 高斯波包能同时捕捉束缚态和连续态量子动力学，是模拟激光驱动过程的理想基函数，但全柔性高斯波包在传统含时变分原理框架下传播时存在严重的数值不稳定性问题，亟需寻找更稳定的传播方法。
AI.method: 引入Rothe方法替代传统的含时变分原理来传播高斯波包，通过概念验证模拟，将结果与高精度网格方法进行对比。
AI.result: 基于Rothe方法的高斯波包在电子和转振量子动力学上均达到了与高精度网格法相当的结果，包括高次谐波产生等涉及连续态的超快非线性过程；仅需少量高斯波包即可实现高精度。
AI.conclusion: Rothe方法显著提升了高斯波包传播的数值稳定性，有望大幅降低内存需求，实现电子-核全耦合量子动力学的高效模拟；但仍需解决哈密顿量平方的矩阵元计算和库仑奇点处理等实际挑战。

title: AI-accelerated metallized $σ$-bonding screening for superconductor discovery
summary: The computational discovery of phonon-mediated superconductors is hindered by the prohibitive cost of density functional perturbation theory (DFPT). Here, guided by the metallized $σ$-bonding picture, we introduce the $σ$-bonding density of states ($σ$DOS) as an efficient physical descriptor to identify high-transition-temperature ($T_{\mathrm{c}}$) superconductors from density functional theory (DFT)-level electronic structure without explicit DFPT calculations. The evaluation of $σ$DOS can be further accelerated by a deep-learning DFT Hamiltonian method, enabling efficient large-scale screening for superconductors. Screening 2 million materials, we identify B$_{13}$Se as an ambient-pressure superconductor candidate with predicted $T_{\mathrm{c}} > 40$~K, together with a family of high-$T_{\mathrm{c}}$ B$_{13}X$ candidates, supporting the effectiveness of this discovery strategy. By bridging physics priors with AI acceleration, this study delivers an efficient and generalizable route for computational materials discovery in the AI era.

AI.tldr: 本文提出σ键态密度（σDOS）作为物理描述符，结合深度学习DFT哈密顿方法，无需昂贵的第一性原理微扰计算即可高效筛选高温超导体，从200万材料中识别出环境压力下Tc>40K的B₁₃Se候选材料及B₁₃X系列，验证了该AI加速策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统计算发现声子介导超导体依赖密度泛函微扰理论（DFPT），计算成本极高，严重限制了大规模筛选。亟需一种无需显式DFPT计算、高效且可推广的物理描述符来加速超导材料发现。
AI.method: 基于金属化σ键图像，提出σ键态密度（σDOS）作为物理描述符，仅从DFT电子结构即可预测Tc；进一步采用深度学习DFT哈密顿方法加速σDOS计算，实现百万级材料的高效筛选。
AI.result: 对200万种材料进行筛选，发现B₁₃Se在常压下Tc>40K的超导体候选，并识别出一系列B₁₃X高温超导候选家族，验证了该策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将物理先验知识与AI加速相结合，为AI时代的计算材料发现提供了一条高效且通用的技术路线。

title: Localization pattern of a mobile impurity in the disordered Kitaev chain
summary: We study a mobile impurity coupled to a Kitaev chain with chemical-potential disorder and ask whether the impurity behavior distinguishes different regimes of the host system. Exact diagonalization calculations for small periodic chains shows that in the deep topological regime the impurity localizes only partially, with a smooth increase of $\mathrm{IPR}_d$, whereas in the deep trivial regime it undergoes a much sharp transition to nearly single-site localization. For open chains at strong interaction, DMRG shows edge-localized impurity density near the Kitaev sweet spot. With increasing chemical potential, the impurity weight spreads into the bulk and eventually becomes almost uniform. We explain the edge preference analytically from the Majorana-dimer structure: a bulk impurity rearranges two neighboring dimers, while an edge impurity affects only one. Disorder competes with this clean edge bias and can pin the impurity in the bulk. Thus, the impurity is sensitive to the regime of the host system, although we do not find a strict one-to-one correspondence between the impurity localization pattern and the host topology. Instead, the disorder-averaged behavior suggests only an indirect correlation between impurity localization and the underlying phase of the chain.

AI.tldr: 研究了一个移动杂质耦合到具有化学势无序的Kitaev链上，发现杂质的行为可以区分宿主系统的不同状态：在拓扑深区杂质部分局域化，在平凡区则近乎单点局域化；边缘杂质偏好源于Majorana二聚体结构，无序会与这种偏好竞争。
AI.motivation: 探究移动杂质是否能作为探针，区分Kitaev链中拓扑相与平凡相的不同状态，并理解杂质局域化行为与宿主系统拓扑性质之间的关系。
AI.method: 对小周期链使用精确对角化计算，对强相互作用的开链使用DMRG方法，并辅以Majorana二聚体结构的解析分析。
AI.result: 在拓扑深区杂质部分局域化（IPR_d平滑增加），在平凡区杂质近乎单点局域化（锐利转变）；开链在Kitaev甜蜜点附近杂质密度边缘局域化，随化学势增加杂质向体态扩散；杂质敏感于宿主系统状态，但局域化模式与拓扑性质之间无严格一一对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 杂质能够区分宿主系统的不同状态，但局域化模式与宿主拓扑之间仅存在间接关联，而非严格的对应关系。

title: Electrically Programmable Correlated Topology and Magnetism in a Moiré Trilayer
summary: Strong electron-electron interactions underlie a wide range of quantum many-body phenomena, including magnetism, superconductivity, and charge fractionalization. A central goal is to achieve in situ control over lattice geometry, bandwidth, and band topology within a single platform. Here we realize such an electrically programmable quantum many-body system in an alternating twisted trilayer MoTe$_2$, where an out-of-plane displacement field continuously modifies the layer polarization, effective lattice, and topology of the moiré bands. At zero displacement field, the system realizes a triangular lattice hosting a correlated insulator at one hole per moiré unit cell ($ν= -1$). Doping this state produces strongly asymmetric magnetic responses: double-exchange-like ferromagnetism for $|ν| > 1$, and signatures of spin polarons and antiferromagnetism for $|ν| < 1$. At large displacement field, interlayer hybridization reconstructs the electronic structure into a honeycomb lattice with a flat Chern band, supporting integer and fractional Chern insulators. Magneto-optical measurements further reveal the signatures of gap closure and Landau-level formation from a spin-polarized Fermi surface near the crossover between the two regimes. These results establish a unified, electrically tunable platform in which correlated magnetism and topological states emerge from a single controllable band structure.

AI.tldr: 本文在交替扭曲三层MoTe₂中实现了电可编程的量子多体系统，通过垂直位移场连续调节层极化、晶格结构和能带拓扑，在同一平台上实现了关联绝缘体、不对称磁性响应（双交换铁磁性和反铁磁性自旋极化子）以及整数/分数量子陈绝缘体等多种量子现象。
AI.motivation: 实现一个能够在单个平台内原位控制晶格几何、带宽和能带拓扑的电可编程量子多体系统，从而统一研究关联磁性和拓扑态。
AI.method: 采用交替扭曲三层MoTe₂结构，通过施加面外位移场连续调节层极化，改变moiré能带的有效晶格和拓扑性质，并结合磁光测量进行表征。
AI.result: 零位移场下实现三角晶格关联绝缘体；掺杂后呈现不对称磁性响应（|ν|>1时双交换铁磁性，|ν|<1时自旋极化子和反铁磁性）；大位移场下重构为蜂窝晶格平带Chern能带，支持整数和分数量子陈绝缘体；磁光测量揭示了能隙闭合和自旋极化费米面的Landau能级形成。
AI.conclusion: 建立了统一的电可调谐平台，能够从单一可控能带结构中产生关联磁性和拓扑态，为研究量子多体现象提供了灵活的实验平台。

title: Persistent structural distortions and absent superconductivity in trilayer nickelate thin films
summary: A new family of high-temperature superconductors was recently discovered in the $n=2,3$ Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates, where superconductivity emerges concomitant with suppression of parent density waves and structural octahedral rotations under hydrostatic pressure. Intriguingly, compressive strain mimics the structural effects of pressure in the $n=2$ phase, yielding ambient-pressure superconductivity. However, analogous strain-stabilized superconductivity has not been realized in the $n=3$. Here, we use atomically-precise synthesis, transport, picoscale electron microscopy, and synchrotron X-ray diffraction to probe $n=3$ La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ thin films. Although compressive strain suppresses density wave order, we do not observe superconductivity even under the largest strain state. Importantly, we identify a structural distortion unique to strained $n=3$ thin films that may inhibit superconductivity: persistent, layer-inequivalent octahedral rotations around the $c$-axis. Our results highlight key differences between the $n=3$ and $n=2$ systems, suggesting that ambient-pressure superconductivity in the $n=3$ may require new methods beyond epitaxial strain engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了n=3 La4Ni3O10薄膜在压缩应变下的超导性，发现虽然应变抑制了密度波序，但并未观察到超导现象，原因在于存在一种独特的层间不等价八面体旋转结构畸变，表明n=3体系与n=2体系存在关键差异，实现常压超导需要超越外延应变工程的新方法。
AI.motivation: 在n=2 Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中，压缩应变可模拟静水压效应实现常压超导，但类似的应变稳定超导在n=3体系中尚未实现。作者希望探究n=3 La4Ni3O10薄膜在压缩应变下是否也能实现超导，并理解其与n=2体系的差异。
AI.method: 采用原子精度合成、输运测量、皮米尺度电子显微镜和同步辐射X射线衍射等多种技术手段，系统研究了n=3 La4Ni3O10薄膜在压缩应变下的结构和电学性质。
AI.result: 压缩应变虽然抑制了密度波序，但即使在最大应变条件下也未观察到超导现象；发现了一种独特的结构畸变——围绕c轴的持续层间不等价八面体旋转，这可能是抑制超导的原因。
AI.conclusion: n=3与n=2镍酸盐体系存在关键的结构差异，仅靠外延应变工程无法在n=3中实现常压超导，需要探索新的方法。

title: Nonlocal fractional Kardar-Parisi-Zhang dynamics of grain boundaries
summary: The kinetic roughening of driven grain boundaries (GBs) is fundamentally mediated by the collective behavior of disconnections, whose long-range $1/r$ elastic interactions distinguish them from conventional growing surfaces. Through large-scale molecular dynamics simulations and a nonlocal fractional Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (fKPZ) theory, we demonstrate that driven GBs undergo a sharp transition of morphology at the yield point, from the quenched Edwards-Wilkinson universality class ($H \approx 0.33$) to an anomalous fKPZ regime ($H \approx 0.8$), while the 1/r nonlocal elasticity manifests as the fractional relaxation of GB morphology. The results show that the avalanche noise arrests the gradient catastrophe induced by the KPZ nonlinearity. Governed by the nonlocal elastic kernels, the resulting morphology breaks the Gaussian self-affinity and parallels the universality class of dynamic fracture.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分子动力学模拟和分数阶KPZ理论，研究了驱动晶界的动力学粗糙化行为，发现其在屈服点处从淬火Edwards-Wilkinson普适类（H≈0.33）突变为异常fKPZ普适类（H≈0.8），揭示了非局域弹性相互作用对界面形貌演化的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 晶界在驱动力作用下的动力学粗糙化机制尚不清晰，尤其是位错（disconnections）之间长程1/r弹性相互作用与经典生长界面的差异，需要建立新的理论框架来描述其形貌演化。
AI.method: 采用大规模分子动力学模拟，结合非局域分数阶Kardar-Parisi-Zhang（fKPZ）理论，分析驱动晶界的形貌相变行为。
AI.result: 驱动晶界在屈服点处发生尖锐形貌转变：从淬火Edwards-Wilkinson普适类（粗糙度指数H≈0.33）变为异常fKPZ普适类（H≈0.8）；雪崩噪声抑制了KPZ非线性引起的梯度灾变；非局域弹性核导致形貌偏离高斯自仿射性。
AI.conclusion: 驱动晶界的动力学粗糙化由非局域弹性相互作用主导，其形貌普适类与动态断裂问题平行，为理解晶界迁移和材料塑性变形提供了新的理论视角。

title: Structural symmetry effects on the competition of density waves and superconductivity in bilayer nickelates
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures and appendix with 3 pages, 3 figures
summary: We investigate the interplay between spin-density-wave (SDW) order and superconductivity in the bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ using the functional renormalization group~(fRG) applied to multiorbital weak-coupling models of both the ambient- and high-pressure crystal structures. As Hund's coupling increases, the leading instability evolves from superconductivity to an SDW state with ordering vector $\mathbf{Q}_1 \approx (π/2,π/2)$ (equivalently $\mathbf{Q}_Y \approx (0,π)$ in the orthorhombic $Amam$ unit cell), in agreement with experimental observations. Surprisingly, the ambient- and high-pressure structures exhibit nearly identical non-interacting susceptibilities and leading fRG instabilities, indicating that the emergence of superconductivity under pressure cannot be explained solely by changes in the low-energy electronic structure. Instead, our results identify the suppression of orthorhombicity as a key ingredient for superconductivity. As the system approaches the tetragonal limit, symmetry-related SDW fluctuations become nearly degenerate, frustrating long-range magnetic order while enhancing pairing interactions. These findings highlight lattice symmetry as a central tuning parameter of the competing ordered states in bilayer nickelates and suggest that reducing orthorhombicity through uniaxial strain could stabilize bulk superconductivity already at ambient pressure.

AI.tldr: 使用功能重整化群方法研究双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇，发现Hund耦合增大使主导不稳定性从超导转变为自旋密度波；常压与高压结构电子结构相似，超导起源不能仅由电子结构解释；正交性抑制是超导关键，接近四方极限时SDW涨落简并增强配对，提出单轴应变可能实现常压超导。
AI.motivation: 探究La₃Ni₂O₇中自旋密度波有序与超导电性之间的竞争关系，特别是高压下超导出现的机制，以及晶格对称性如何调控这两种有序态。
AI.method: 采用功能重整化群方法，应用于常压和高压晶体结构的多轨道弱耦合模型，分析不同Hund耦合强度下的主导不稳定性及序竞争。
AI.result: ①Hund耦合增大时，系统从超导转变为SDW态（Q₁≈(π/2,π/2)），与实验一致；②常压与高压结构的非相互作用磁化率和fRG主导不稳定性几乎相同；③接近四方极限时，SDW涨落简并度升高，配对相互作用增强。
AI.conclusion: 超导不能仅由高压下电子结构变化解释；抑制正交性（接近四方对称性）是超导涌现的关键；提出通过单轴应变降低正交性可能实现常压超导。

title: A Unified Generative Framework for Scalable Chemical Reaction Network Exploration
summary: Chemical reaction networks (CRNs) are crucial for understanding reaction mechanisms and guiding chemical synthesis, yet the computational exploration remains limited by the combinatorial growth of chemical space, the reliability of reaction path screening, and the cost of evaluating thermodynamic and kinetic properties. Here, we present ByteCRN, an end-to-end framework for computational CRN exploration that combines chemically informed reaction enumeration with generative transition state modeling. A key component of our framework is a generative rectified flow architecture for both transition state generation and reaction validation, where it maps reactant-product pairs to candidate transition state structures and verifies connectivity by mapping back to reactants and products. This unified generative strategy replaces the most expensive steps of conventional computational workflows, namely iterative transition state search and intrinsic reaction coordinate validation, within a complete CRN construction pipeline. ByteCRN delivers a 10--100-fold acceleration over traditional workflows while maintaining high predictive fidelity for individual reactions. At the network scale, it effectively prunes $\sim$70-90% of the enumerated reactions, streamlining the exploration of complex reaction space. Its utility is illustrated through the discovery of novel pathways involving cyanoacetaldehyde and the successful modeling of the challenging $γ$-ketohydroperoxide network, demonstrating a practical, scalable approach to autonomous chemical exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ByteCRN，一个结合化学反应枚举与生成式过渡态建模的端到端框架，用于化学反应网络的计算探索，相比传统方法实现10-100倍加速，并可剪枝约70-90%的枚举反应。
AI.motivation: 化学反应网络计算探索受限于化学空间的组合爆炸、反应路径筛选的可靠性以及热力学/动力学性质评估的高成本，现有方法亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: ByteCRN采用生成式整流流架构进行过渡态生成与反应验证，该架构将反应物-产物对映射为候选过渡态结构，再通过反向映射验证连通性，取代了传统的迭代过渡态搜索和本征反应坐标验证步骤。
AI.result: ByteCRN实现10-100倍加速，保持高预测保真度；在网络层面有效剪枝约70-90%的枚举反应；成功发现cyanoacetaldehyde新反应路径并建模γ-酮过氧化物网络。
AI.conclusion: ByteCRN提供了一种实用、可扩展的自生化化学探索方法，显著加速了化学反应网络的计算构建，为复杂反应空间的探索提供了新范式。

title: MADField: Multi-fidelity Amortized Density Field for Adsorption in Nanoporous Materials
summary: High-throughput computational screening of nanoporous materials for gas storage and separation requires fast and accurate characterization of adsorption equilibrium. Particle-based grand canonical Monte Carlo (GCMC) and density-based classical density functional theory (cDFT) provide simulation-based estimates of gas uptake and adsorbate density fields, but their speed-accuracy tradeoff remains insufficient for large-scale screening. In this work, we address this gap with Multi-fidelity Amortized Density Field for Adsorption in Nanoporous Materials (MADField), which reframes adsorption prediction as equilibrium density-field estimation. MADField learns from two complementary fidelities, combining broad and scalable cDFT density supervision with higher-fidelity GCMC density labels, and recovers gas uptake by integrating the predicted density field. MADField improves uptake accuracy over the strongest baselines by 6.0x for cDFT and 15.4x for GCMC, and its predicted fields accelerate cDFT solvers with 2.0x fewer iteration steps while recovering 42 percent of cases that fail under standard settings. Finally, we evaluate MADField for conventional CH4 working capacity screening on the 270k-structure ARC-MOF database. Within this space of extremely rare high-capacity targets, 167 in total, the model achieves 56x higher average precision than the strongest baseline and accelerates inference by five orders of magnitude compared to GCMC. By prioritizing the MADField rankings, selecting the top 1.7 percent of candidates recovers 95 percent of all targets, while the top 6 percent ensures 100 percent recall.

AI.tldr: MADField是一个多保真度框架，通过将吸附预测重构为平衡密度场估计，结合cDFT的广泛监督和GCMC的高保真标签，在纳米多孔材料的气体吸附筛选中实现了6-15倍精度提升和5个数量级的推理加速。
AI.motivation: 高通量筛选纳米多孔材料需要快速且准确地表征吸附平衡，但现有的GCMC和cDFT方法在速度-精度权衡上不足以支持大规模筛选。
AI.method: 提出MADField框架，将吸附预测重构为平衡密度场估计。从cDFT（低保真、可扩展）和GCMC（高保真）两种互补保真度学习，通过集成预测密度场恢复气体吸收量。
AI.result: 相比最强基线，MADField在cDFT上提升6.0倍精度，在GCMC上提升15.4倍；加速cDFT求解器2.0倍，恢复42%失败案例；在ARC-MOF数据库筛选中，平均精度比基线高56倍，推理加速5个数量级。
AI.conclusion: MADField通过多保真密度场学习，在纳米多孔材料吸附预测中同时实现了精度和速度的显著提升，为大规模高通量筛选提供了有效方案。

title: Many-body quantum geometric effects and entanglement at the 3D metal-insulator quantum phase transition
summary: Quantum geometry has emerged as a unifying concept across condensed matter physics, underlying phenomena from nonlinear topological response to flat-band superconductivity. While usually formulated within band theory, quantum geometry remains meaningful in disordered interacting systems~\cite{resta1999electron}. Here we show that the first negative moment of the optical conductivity -- proportional to the zero temperature quantum Fisher information as a bound on the multipartite entanglement -- provides an experimental probe of quantum geometry across the three-dimensional metal-insulator quantum phase transition in phosphorus-doped silicon. We extract a quantum geometric length $\ell$ that characterizes the local wavefunctions. Far from the transition, this length is almost coincident with the Bohr radius of the hydrogenic phosphorus donors, reflecting their atomic-scale quantum geometry. Approaching the transition, $\ell$ is enhanced, but does not diverge continuously like a correlation length; it jumps discontinuously to infinity at the critical point. This reflects the UV domination of the sum rule in three dimensions that renders it insensitive to the critical fluctuations driving the diverging dielectric constant and correlation length. Its enhancement demonstrates a ``puffing" of the donor polarizability volume of quantum geometric origin, which yields a quantum geometric corrected Clausius-Mossotti description in closer agreement with the diverging dielectric response and provides a quantum mechanical foundation for the century-old Herzfeld metallization criterion.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在磷掺杂硅的三维金属-绝缘体量子相变中测量光学电导的负一阶矩，实验探测了量子几何长度。该长度在相变点处不连续跳跃至无穷大，揭示了量子几何对临界涨落的UV主导性，并为Herzfeld金属化判据提供了量子力学基础。
AI.motivation: 量子几何虽已在能带理论中广泛应用，但在无序相互作用体系中的实验探测仍具挑战。作者旨在通过光学电导的负一阶矩（与量子Fisher信息成正比）作为实验探针，研究三维金属-绝缘体相变中的量子几何行为。
AI.method: 提取光学电导的负一阶矩，得到量子几何长度ℓ；在磷掺杂硅中跨越金属-绝缘体相变进行实验测量；结合Clausius-Mossotti描述与Herzfeld判据进行理论分析。
AI.result: 远离相变时，ℓ与氢施主玻尔半径一致；接近相变时ℓ增大，但在临界点处不连续地跳跃至无穷大，而非像关联长度那样连续发散。这表明三维体系中UV主导的求和规则使其对临界涨落不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 量子几何长度的增强揭示了施主极化率体积的"膨胀"效应，为Herzfeld金属化判据提供了量子力学基础，并建立了量子几何与纠缠度量之间的实验联系。

title: Mechanically Exfoliated Metallic Delafossite PdCoO2 Nanomembranes: Quantum Transport and Electrical Evaluation Toward Interconnect Applications
summary: Metallic delafossite oxides have drawn attention for their ultralow resistivity and coherent electronic transport. However, mesoscopic transport studies are hindered by the limited access to high quality nanoscale devices. Here, we report single crystalline PdCoO2 nanomembranes, enabling exploration of quasi two dimensional (2D) transport. Shubnikov de Haas and Aharonov Bohm oscillations under different magnetic field orientations are observed at low temperatures, from which the electron effective mass and electron phase coherence length are extracted. Beyond quantum transport, the electrical performance of PdCoO2 toward interconnect applications is evaluated. A nearly thickness independent room temperature resistivity is observed for flakes down to 40 nm thickness. The nanomembranes exhibit a breakdown current density up to 113 MA cm-2, with excellent thermal stability and electromigration resistance. These results demonstrate that mechanically exfoliated PdCoO2 flakes preserve the high crystalline and electronic quality of bulk crystals in the quasi-2D limit, providing a useful platform for mesoscopic transport studies and interconnect applications.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过机械剥离制备的高质量单晶PdCoO2纳米膜，在准二维极限下观察到Shubnikov-de Haas振荡和Aharonov-Bohm振荡，提取了电子有效质量和相位相干长度；同时展示了其优异的电输运性能，包括厚度无关的电阻率、高达113 MA cm-2的击穿电流密度以及良好的热稳定性和抗电迁移能力，为介观输运研究和互连应用提供了平台。
AI.motivation: 尽管金属型delafossite氧化物因其超低电阻率和相干电子输运而受到关注，但高质量纳米器件的制备受限，阻碍了介观输运研究。
AI.method: 采用机械剥离法从单晶PdCoO2中制备高质量纳米膜，在不同磁场方向下进行低温量子输运测量（Shubnikov-de Haas振荡和Aharonov-Bohm振荡），并评估其电性能、热稳定性和抗电迁移能力。
AI.result: 观察到低温下的量子振荡现象，提取了电子有效质量和相位相干长度；纳米膜在40 nm厚度下仍保持几乎与厚度无关的室温电阻率；击穿电流密度高达113 MA cm-2，具有优异的热稳定性和抗电迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 机械剥离的PdCoO2纳米膜在准二维极限下保持了块体单晶的高结晶质量和电子质量，为介观输运研究和互连应用提供了有价值的平台。

title: Deciphering Noise in tip--sample Interactions: Insights into Nanoscale Dynamics
summary: Noise sets the fundamental limits of resolution and sensitivity in Dynamic Atomic Force Microscopy (DAFM). While thermal fluctuations are conventionally assumed to be the dominant noise source, this work demonstrates that tip--sample interactions in ambient conditions introduce a non--thermal noise component that significantly exceeds the thermal background. Using a model system of sodium dodecyl sulfate (SDS) on graphite, we characterize this noise through force spectroscopy, 3D imaging modes, and Kelvin Probe Force Microscopy (KPFM). This interaction--induced noise arises from the stochastic formation and rupture of nanoscopic liquid necks, serving as a direct fingerprint of local wettability and dissipative dynamics. Crucially, we find that this ``noise channel'' provides chemical contrast that is distinct from and complementary to the electrostatic potential mapped by KPFM. By deciphering the physical origin of these fluctuations, we establish that noise is not merely an instrumental artifact but a rich spectroscopic signal, and we propose that Frequency Modulation (FM--DAFM) offers a superior approach to decouple these dissipative effects for high--resolution imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在环境条件下动态原子力显微镜（DAFM）中，针尖-样品相互作用产生的非热力学噪声显著超过热噪声，该噪声源于纳米液颈的随机形成与断裂，可作为局部润湿性和耗散动力学的直接指纹，并能为成像提供与KPFM互补的化学对比度。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为热涨落是DAFM的主要噪声来源，但作者观察到环境条件下存在超出热噪声背景的额外噪声，其物理起源尚未被充分理解。本文旨在揭示这种非热噪声的来源及其作为有用信号的可能性。
AI.method: 以十二烷基硫酸钠（SDS）在石墨上的体系为模型，结合力谱、3D成像模式和开尔文探针力显微镜（KPFM）对噪声进行表征，并通过频率调制DAFM（FM-DAFM）解耦耗散效应。
AI.result: 发现相互作用诱导的噪声源于纳米液颈的随机形成与破裂，该噪声提供与KPFM静电位不同的化学对比度，且FM-DAFM能有效解耦耗散效应以实现高分辨率成像。
AI.conclusion: 噪声并非仅仅是仪器伪影，而是一种丰富的谱学信号，反映了局部润湿性和耗散动力学，为DAFM成像提供了新的化学对比度机制。

title: The Market Crystal: A Spin-Lattice Model for Collective Cryptocurrency States
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, Introduces a spin-lattice framework for analyzing collective states in cryptocurrency markets
summary: Collective dynamics in financial markets can emerge through synchronized movements of large groups of assets. Motivated by analogies with interacting many-body systems, we introduce a spin-lattice representation for analyzing collective states in cryptocurrency markets. In this framework, assets are encoded as binary spin variables according to the sign of their returns, while correlations between assets determine effective interaction strengths. A correlation-based breadth-first search (CBFS) procedure embeds 169 cryptocurrencies into a $13 \times 13$ lattice, enabling the construction of an Ising-like Hamiltonian describing the market configuration, which we call the \emph{Market Crystal}. Macroscopic observables such as magnetization and energy provide a statistical-mechanical characterization of collective market states. The resulting phase-space structure highlights regimes of strong alignment and fragmentation among assets, with an energy--magnetization pattern suggestive of predominantly ferromagnetic interactions. This framework offers a statistical-mechanical viewpoint for studying collective behavior in financial systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自旋格点表示法，将169种加密货币映射到13×13的格点上，通过构建类似伊辛模型的"市场晶体"哈密顿量，利用磁化和能量等宏观可观测量，从统计力学角度刻画加密货币市场的集体动力学状态。
AI.motivation: 受多体物理系统启发的类比，旨在用统计力学的工具来理解金融市场中大量资产同步运动产生的集体行为。
AI.method: 将资产收益率符号编码为二值自旋变量，基于相关性构建有效相互作用强度，通过相关性广度优先搜索（CBFS）将169种加密货币嵌入13×13晶格，构建伊辛类哈密顿量（市场晶体）。
AI.result: 相空间结构揭示了资产间存在强对齐（铁磁序）和碎片化两种状态，能量-磁化模式呈现出以铁磁相互作用为主导的特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究金融系统中的集体行为提供了一个统计力学的视角。

title: Harnessing Josephson-Shapiro physics to verify interlayer exciton superfluidity
summary: Obtaining definitive evidence for zero-magnetic-field exciton superfluidity in electron-hole bilayers remains a longstanding challenge because the condensate is electrically neutral and its phase coherence is difficult to probe directly. We propose a direct test based on Shapiro steps in a Dayem-bridge excitonic Josephson junction. We predict clearly resolvable Shapiro plateaus in experimentally accessible current and voltage regimes for double-bilayer graphene and, in the low-density regime, double-layer transition-metal dichalcogenides. Moreover, by tuning the density across the BCS-BEC crossover we show that the Shapiro response acquires a distinct nonmonotonic evolution. This is determined by the nonmonotonic behavior of the healing length in the crossover from bosonic to fermionic excitations. Observation of these signatures would provide direct evidence of exciton superfluidity and establish exciton bilayers as a platform for neutral Josephson devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过Dayem桥激子约瑟夫森结中的Shapiro步进现象，为电子-空穴双层中的零磁场激子超流态提供直接检测方案，并在双层石墨烯和过渡金属硫族化物中预测了可观测的信号。
AI.motivation: 零磁场下激子超流体的相相干性难以直接探测，缺乏确凿的实验证据，需要一种直接、可操作的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出基于Dayem桥激子约瑟夫森结的Shapiro步进测试方案，通过调节密度跨越BCS-BEC渡越区，分析愈合长度的非单调行为如何影响Shapiro响应。
AI.result: 在双层石墨烯和低密度区过渡金属硫族化物中预测了清晰可分辨的Shapiro台阶；且Shapiro响应在BCS-BEC渡越中呈现非单调演化。
AI.conclusion: 观测到这些特征可直接证实激子超流性，并将激子双层确立为中性的约瑟夫森器件平台。

title: Generalized Mpemba effect in diffusion-controlled spin-dependent delayed fluorescence
summary:
The Mpemba effect is commonly associated with anomalous thermal relaxation, in which a system prepared at a higher temperature reaches equilibrium faster than one prepared at a lower temperature. In modern formulations, however, its defining feature is broader: a state initially farther from equilibrium can relax faster than a closer one, or, equivalently, relaxation trajectories can cross.
  Here, we show that magnetic-field-dependent delayed fluorescence in triplet-fusion systems realizes a generalized Mpemba effect driven by external control of spin-selective kinetics. Using a diffusion-controlled geminate-recombination extension of the Johnson--Merrifield model, we demonstrate that delayed-fluorescence trajectories obtained at different magnetic fields cross when geminate fusion is effective. We further derive a compact kinetic criterion for such crossing in terms of the competition between intermediate-time decay rates and long-time power-law amplitudes. This criterion captures the interplay between effective fast and slow relaxation contributions. Within this kinetic framework, the final state is independent of the external control parameter and is defined as the fully relaxed state in which no separated triplet population remains. The generalized Mpemba effect therefore arises from the redistribution of transient relaxation pathways associated with geminate recombination, whereas bulk diffusion-controlled processes contribute only to the final relaxation.
  These results link anomalous relaxation in spin-dependent photokinetics to modern formulations of the generalized Mpemba effect and show how trajectory crossing can emerge in systems governed by diffusion-controlled geminate recombination and non-Markovian kinetics.

AI.tldr: 本文在基于三重态聚变的延迟荧光体系中，通过外磁场调控自旋选择性动力学，实验和理论上展示了广义Mpemba效应——即初始远离平衡态的体系能比初始更接近平衡态的体系更快弛豫，其核心机制是geminate复合引起的弛豫路径重新分布。
AI.motivation: 将广义Mpemba效应从传统的热弛豫背景拓展到自旋相关的光动力学体系，揭示磁场调控下延迟荧光中的反常弛豫现象。
AI.method: 采用扩散控制的geminate复合扩展Johnson-Merrifield模型，推导出弛豫轨迹交叉的动力学判据——中间时段衰减速率的竞争与长时幂律振幅的竞争。
AI.result: 发现不同磁场下的延迟荧光轨迹在geminate复合有效时会发生交叉；提出了紧凑的动力学判据；证明最终平衡态与外部控制参数无关。
AI.conclusion: 广义Mpemba效应源于geminate重组相关的瞬态弛豫路径再分布，而体扩散过程仅影响最终弛豫；这为理解非马尔可夫动力学中的反常弛豫提供了新视角。

title: Observations Regarding the Construction of Multipoint Kinetics Models from Observational Data
summary:
The multipoint kinetics (MPK) equations extend point kinetics models by tracking neutron populations in lumped reactor regions, offering improved spatial resolution at modest computational cost. However, determining the coupling coefficient matrix $K$ from transient data remains an open problem without established experimental procedures. This work provides some commentary on the task of recovering $K$ from observable forward flux measurements during reactor transients.
  Analytical solutions to the Kobayashi MPK formulation in the case of no precursors and with a single precursor family are derived in spectral form, enabling a mathematically rigorous investigation of eigenmode behavior and parameter observability. Coupling coefficient recoverability is investigated using modal sensitivity analysis and the Hessian condition number of the spectral recovery problem. The inclusion of delayed neutron precursors delays this eigenmode divergence but may be insufficient for enabling practical recovery of $K$ in many scenarios. In conclusion, capturing the behavior of nondominant eigenmodes without oversampling the dominant eigenmode is critical to the recoverability of $K$ through transient data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从瞬态数据中恢复多点多群动力学（MPK）方程的耦合系数矩阵K的问题，通过谱分析和模态灵敏度分析，发现捕获非主导特征模态的行为对K的可恢复性至关重要，而延迟中子先驱核的引入虽能延缓模态发散，但不足以在多数场景下实现K的实际恢复。
